holdings.infoBox: IVE is an equity ETF with a total of 443 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.53%, Amazon.com at 3.78%, Exxon Mobil at 2.04%, Intel at 1.97%, and Walmart at 1.79%.

overview.description: The iShares S&P 500 Value ETF (IVE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Value index. The fund tracks an index of primarily large-cap US stocks. The index uses three fundamental factors to select value stocks from the S&P 500 Index. IVE was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
